name: Multi-User Memory
description: Scoped memory with curated users, shared groups, approvals, and per-user language defaults.

enabled.label: Enable Multi-User Memory
enabled.help: Turns on scoped user and group memory overlays for the default memory stack.

autoDiscover.label: Auto-Discover New Senders
autoDiscover.help: Unknown senders become provisional users in the runtime store until an admin curates them in config.

defaultLanguage.label: Default Reply Language
defaultLanguage.help: Fallback language when a matched user does not have a preferred language.

approvalCenterBaseUrl.label: Approval Center Base URL
approvalCenterBaseUrl.help: Optional HTTPS base URL for the approval center page. Leave blank to auto-detect from Tailscale Serve or the gateway bind when possible.

approvalDelivery.mode.label: Approval Delivery Mode
approvalDelivery.mode.help: How proposal approvals should be requested in v1.

approvalDelivery.channelId.label: Approval Channel Override
approvalDelivery.channelId.help: Optional channel override for approval requests when not using the current session.

approvalDelivery.accountId.label: Approval Account Override
approvalDelivery.accountId.help: Optional account override for approval requests.

approvalDelivery.to.label: Approval Target Override
approvalDelivery.to.help: Optional explicit target for approval requests.

curatorAgentId.label: Curator Agent Id
curatorAgentId.help: Agent id allowed to run the curation workflow without owner privileges.

adminUserIds.label: Admin User Ids
adminUserIds.help: Canonical user ids that should be treated as multi-user-memory admins.

users.label: Users
users.help: Curated user catalog keyed by canonical user id.

users.*.displayName.label: Display Name
users.*.displayName.help: Human-readable name shown in admin tooling and curation output.

users.*.preferredLanguage.label: Preferred Language
users.*.preferredLanguage.help: Language used for replies and plugin-generated notices for this user.

users.*.identities.label: Channel Identities
users.*.identities.help: Exact channel/account/sender identities that map to this user.

users.*.identities.*.label.label: Identity Label
users.*.identities.*.label.help: Optional admin label for this channel identity.

users.*.identities.*.channelId.label: Channel Id
users.*.identities.*.channelId.help: Exact channel id, for example whatsapp, telegram, or discord.

users.*.identities.*.accountId.label: Account Id
users.*.identities.*.accountId.help: Optional account id when a channel has multiple configured accounts.

users.*.identities.*.senderId.label: Sender Id
users.*.identities.*.senderId.help: Trusted sender id to match for this identity.

users.*.identities.*.senderName.label: Sender Name
users.*.identities.*.senderName.help: Optional display name captured for admin reference.

users.*.identities.*.senderUsername.label: Sender Username
users.*.identities.*.senderUsername.help: Optional username captured for admin reference.

users.*.active.label: Active User
users.*.active.help: Inactive users are ignored for curated identity matching.

users.*.notes.label: Admin Notes
users.*.notes.help: Optional operator notes for this user.

groups.label: Groups
groups.help: Shared memory groups keyed by group id.

groups.*.parentGroupIds.label: Parent Group Ids
groups.*.parentGroupIds.help: Broader groups that inherit this group's members upward.

groups.*.memberUserIds.label: Member User Ids
groups.*.memberUserIds.help: Canonical users that belong directly to this group.

groups.*.active.label: Active Group
groups.*.active.help: Inactive groups are ignored for memory visibility and curation.

groups.*.description.label: Description
groups.*.description.help: Optional admin description for the group.
